Chief Complaint: Patient presents with recurring migraines, worsening over the past 3 weeks.

History of Present Illness:
Margaret Thompson is a 47-year-old female referred by Dr. Robert Chen (NPI: 1234567890) at Northwest Medical Associates. She reports severe headaches occurring 3-4 times per week since January 2026. Prior treatment by Dr. Sarah Williams at Cascade Neurology (phone: (206) 555-8743) was ineffective. Patient was previously seen at Virginia Mason Medical Center.

Medications:
- Sumatriptan 100mg PRN (prescribed by Dr. Chen)
- Lisinopril 10mg daily

Allergies: Penicillin, Sulfa drugs
